code: import React from"react";import"./CorporationView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CorporationSidebar=_ref=>{let{corporations,onSelectCorporation,selectedCorporationId}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"corporation-sidebar",children:corporations.map(corp=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`sidebar-icon ${selectedCorporationId===corp.id?"active":""}`,title:corp.name,onClick:()=>onSelectCorporation(corp),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:`/icons/${corp.icon}`,alt:corp.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:corp.name})]},corp.id))});};export default CorporationSidebar;
